title: Battle Shrines
description: Adds a new small structure, the battle shrine, which can be activated to spawn a horde of mobs and get loot as a reward.
body:
# Overview
A datapack/mod that adds a new small structure that will naturally generate in the overworld, the battle shrine, which will activate when right clicked, and will spawn a large amount of zombies and skeletons with potion effects and armor, after defeating all enemies spawned by the shrine, a chest will appear on top of it, containing random loot very useful early game.
If you're looking for more late game loot, you're in luck! Throwing 5 diamonds near the shrine will empower it once activated, and the shrine will spawn more challenging mobs such as husks with full iron armor, strength, speed and resistance, blazes ad wither skeletons dual-wielding iron swords. Upon defeating all of these enemies, the shrine will give you much more powerful loot such as enchanted books, a knockback 4 iron sword, netherite scrap, ancient debris and more!
